name: OctoTrip Rental Cars
description: Free rental car search with real-time pricing from multiple providers worldwide. No API key required. Booking links contain affiliate attribution.
author: OctoTrip

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for rental cars by location, dates, and preferences. Returns available cars from multiple vendors grouped by category with real-time pricing. Results may include affiliate-attributed booking links.

pickup_date.description: Pickup date in any common format

dropoff_date.description: Dropoff date in any common format

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code, defaults to EUR
